result:
All fixes are implemented and verified via a local production build (`next build` + `next start`) since the harness's dev server at :49497 wasn't responding to requests in this sandbox. Summary:

**Root cause (from GSC + source):** Lumina pivoted from a prior product, InboxZap (email cleanup tool), but the pivot was only half-finished in code. Every bit of existing organic visibility was leftover InboxZap brand/content ‚Äî the actual Lumina product had **zero** search presence, and several core pages were broken.

**What was wrong:**
1. `layout.tsx` `<title>`/description/OG all said "InboxZap ‚Äî Clean Your Inbox in Minutes" while the page itself is about an AI meeting assistant ‚Äî actively misleading in search results.
2. Nav/hero linked to `/features` and `/pricing` ‚Äî neither page existed (404s on primary conversion paths).
3. `/faq` 301-redirected to `/#faq`, but no `id="faq"` section existed on the homepage (broken redirect).
4. `/blog` was a client component fetching `/api/posts` ‚Äî no such API route exists in the source, so the blog silently failed to load.
5. `sitemap.ts` explicitly excluded blog posts (TODO comment), even though GSC showed 12 indexed post URLs.
6. Those 12 indexed posts were all legacy InboxZap topics (bulk-delete emails, Gmail storage, unsubscribe, etc.) ‚Äî irrelevant to Lumina and un-convertible even if they ranked.

**Fixes applied:**
- Rewrote `layout.tsx` metadata to accurately describe Lumina, added `metadataBase`, canonical, OG/Twitter tags, and `SoftwareApplication` JSON-LD. Added a code-generated OG image (`app/opengraph-image.tsx`, no binary asset needed).
- Built real `/features` and `/pricing` pages targeting MOFU/BOFU keywords.
- Added a real FAQ section (with `id="faq"` and `FAQPage` JSON-LD) to the homepage, including an explicit "Is Lumina the same as InboxZap?" entry ‚Äî this legitimately captures confused branded searchers instead of relying on a mismatched title tag.
- Rebuilt the blog as server-rendered (`lib/posts.ts` + `app/blog/page.tsx` + `app/blog/[slug]/page.tsx`) with `Article` JSON-LD, and wrote 6 new posts targeting the AI-meeting-assistant keyword cluster (guide, minutes template, best-of listicle, a competitor comparison, meeting-fatigue, action-items) ‚Äî TOFU through BOFU.
- 301-redirected the 12 legacy `/blog/post-N` URLs to `/blog` (no honest 1:1 topical match exists, so consolidating beats leaving indexed URLs 404ing).
- Fixed `sitemap.ts` to include `/features`, `/pricing`, and all real blog post URLs.

**Verified:** production build succeeds, all routes return correct status codes (200/308/404 as expected), redirects resolve to the right targets, and titles/canonicals/JSON-LD render correctly ‚Äî checked via local `next build && next start` on an alternate port since :49497 was unresponsive from this sandbox. Worth re-checking the harness's live server separately.
